zh.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Warburton II於大約1339年出生在英國爾瓦布爾頓時，他的父親Geoffrey de Warburton IV43歲，母親Elen of Warburton24歲。他於大約1329年與Agnes de Wevers在英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1384年享年47歲。

zh-hans.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Warburton II于大约1339年出生在英国爾瓦布爾頓时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Warburton IV43岁，母亲Elen of Warburton24岁。他于大约1329年与Agnes de Wevers在英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1384年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Warburton II was born about 1339, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Warburton IV, was 43 and his mother, Elen of Warburton, was 24. He married Agnes de Wevers about 1329, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1384, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Warburton II est né environ 1339, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Warburton IV, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elen of Warburton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Wevers environ 1329, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1384, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Warburton II um 1339 in Warburton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Warburton IV 43 und seine Mutter Elen of Warburton 24. Er hat um 1329 in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Wevers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1384 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Warburton II è nato il circa 1339 nel Warburton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Warburton IV, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elen of Warburton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Wevers circa 1329, nel Warburton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1384, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Warburton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトン
ja.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトン
ja.lifeSummary: John de Warburton IIが約1339年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Warburton IVは43歳，母Elen of Warburtonは24歳であった。約1329年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンでAgnes de Weversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1384年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Warburton II(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 체실르 워버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Warburton IV(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen of Warburton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워버턴에서 Agnes de Wevers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1384년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1339–about 1384: tany ho any amin'ny 1339–tany ho any amin'ny 1384

mn.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: Warburton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Warburton II nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Warburton IV, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elen of Warburton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Wevers aproximadamente 1329, em Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1384, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Warburton II родился около 1339 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Warburton IV было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elen of Warburton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Wevers около 1329 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1384 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

sm.about 1339–about 1384: e tusa o le 1339–e tusa o le 1384

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Warburton II nació aproximadamente 1339, en Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Warburton IV, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elen of Warburton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes de Wevers aproximadamente 1329, en Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1384, a la edad de 47 años.
